dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4912 IS: Building Up Farmland Frontiers for Ecological Resilience Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Welch (for himself and Mr. Sanders) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry

form.official-title: To amend the Food Security Act of 1985 to clarify land eligible for enrollment in the conservation reserve program.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Building Up Farmland Frontiers for Ecological Resilience Act or the BUFFER Act.

section.header: Eligible land under the conservation reserve program
section.text: Section 1231(b) of the Food Security Act of 1985 (16 U.S.C. 3831(b)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in paragraph (6)(B)(ii), by striking or at the end;

subparagraph.text: in the matter preceding subparagraph (A), by striking as determined by the Secretary,; and
in subparagraph (C), by striking the period at the end and inserting ; or; and

paragraph.text: by adding at the end the following:

land that is otherwise eligible for enrollment and for which a Tribal, State, or other local law, ordinance, or other regulation requires any resource-conserving or environmental protection measure or practice, unless the requirement to implement such a measure or practice has been imposed by an administrative order or a court order, in which case that land shall not be eligible for enrollment.
